name: MikroTik GrooveA 52 ac
title: MikroTik GrooveA 52 ac
short_description: 720MHz Atheros CPU, 64MB RAM, 1 GLAN, 2.4/5GHz 802.11a/b/g/n/ac, ROS L4, POE Adapter and Omni Antenna Included
description: 720MHz Atheros CPU, 64MB RAM, 1 GLAN, 2.4/5GHz 802.11a/b/g/n/ac, ROS L4, POE Adapter and Omni Antenna Included

detailed_description.heading: Compact Outdoor Connectivity
detailed_description.text: Experience amazing connectivity with the MikroTik GrooveA 52 ac, the compact powerhouse designed to thrive in challenging environments. As the smallest model in the outdoor series, this AP/Backbone/CPE offers a weatherproof and durable solution with an IP55 protection rating, ensuring reliable performance in wireless networking scenarios. Its compact design contains a wealth of features, providing seamless connectivity for outdoor deployments. Whether utilizing the included antenna or opting for a custom choice, this device ensures a robust and reliable wireless experience, making it the ideal companion for connectivity challenges in various environments.

detailed_description.heading: Adaptable Roles: AP, Backbone, CPE
detailed_description.text: Enjoy the wireless performance of MikroTik GrooveA 52 ac, a device offering a blend of cutting-edge technology and adaptability. As a versatile 2.4/5GHz Software Selectable AP/Backbone/CPE, the GrooveA ac stands out for its ability to surpass traditional limitations. This device not only supports the high-performance 802.11ac standard but also provides a Gigabit Ethernet port for fast data transfer. What sets the GrooveA 52 ac apart is its "Software Selectable" feature, enabling users to dynamically configure or switch between the 2.4GHz and 5GHz bands using intuitive software settings. The GrooveA 52 ac, functioning as an Access Point (AP), Backbone, or Customer Premises Equipment (CPE), showcases its multifaceted capabilities. In AP mode, it serves as a central hub for wireless clients, facilitating seamless network access and communication. In a backbone configuration, it establishes high-speed connections between network segments, elevating overall network performance. As a CPE, the device operates as a receiver or endpoint, connecting to a central access point or backbone infrastructure.

detailed_description.heading: Routing with Level 4 License
detailed_description.text: The RouterBOARD, a specialized router device, lays the foundation for the GrooveA 52 ac. Notably, the MikroTik GrooveA 52 ac comes equipped with a Level 4 license, signifying an advanced tier of feature access within the MikroTik RouterOS ecosystem. A Level 4 license enhances the device's capabilities, unlocking a broader range of advanced functionalities. This includes support for additional routing protocols, VPN features, and more extensive network management tools. The integration of a Level 4 license elevates the GrooveA 52 ac to a versatile networking solution, capable of meeting the demands of varied and complex networking environments.

detailed_description.heading: Precision in Wireless Optimization
detailed_description.text: At its core, the GrooveA 52 ac is equipped with a game-changing Dual Band 2.4/5 GHz Omni-directional antenna. The dual-band capability empowers the device to operate seamlessly across the 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz bands, providing unparalleled flexibility in wireless communication. Complementing this, the antenna ensures a 360-degree coverage pattern, making it ideal for scenarios demanding signals to reach devices in various directions, particularly in open areas or environments with varying client device locations. Delving into the specifics, the antenna's gains boast a 6dBi gain for the 2.4 GHz band and an impressive 8dBi for the 5 GHz band. These gains signify the antenna's capability to focus and amplify signals in their respective bands, a crucial attribute for optimizing wireless connections.
